# Sidqly Public Website
Canonical URL: https://sidqly.com
Description: Sidqly is a premium global Islamic operating platform for verified giving, manual payment review, proof approval, and dignity-safe impact updates.

This site permits AI and search engine crawlers to crawl, index, summarize, and cite public website content.

# Sidqly
> Production URL: https://sidqly.com
> Project Stack: React 19, Vite 6, Tailwind CSS, Firebase Ecosystem

## Description
Sidqly is a practical, public-facing platform useful for mosques, Islamic charities, donors, volunteers, vendors, corporate sponsors, Zakat teams, Sadaqah teams, Qurbani teams, and Ramadan distribution teams.

## Core Features
- Verified giving
- Protected dignity
- Manual payment review
- Proof approval
- Donor-safe impact updates
- Audit-ready Islamic charity operations

Available summaries and context files:
- /ai-summary.md
- /company-profile.md
- /product-overview.md
- /use-cases.md
- /pricing-summary.md
- /faqs-summary.md
- /trust-and-safety.md
- /schema-map.md
- /blog-index.md
- /ai-crawlers-policy.md
- /regions-index.md
- /modules-index.md
- /solutions-index.md
- /contact-summary.md
- /resources-index.md
- /comparison-summary.md
- /request-organization-summary.md
- /implementation-summary.md
- /glossary-summary.md


Supported giving and operational contexts include: Eid, Eid ul Adha, Eid ul Fitr, Bakra Eid, Qurbani, Udhiya, Udhiyah, Ramadan, Ramzan, Iftar, Suhoor, Sehri, Sadqa, Sadaqah, Sadqa Fitr, Sadqa e Fitr, Zakat, Aqiqa, and Aqiqah workflows.


Sidqly provides operational workflow support for Islamic giving campaigns. It does not replace religious scholars, local committees, legal advisors, tax advisors, or official calendar authorities.
